notes.scope: T4-T8 gear (weapons, armors, head, shoes, offhands, bags, capes)
notes.a7_a30: volume-weighted mean of AODP Black Market daily history
notes.vol7: mean items/day at Black Market over last 7 days (item_count)
notes.bm_buy: AODP buy_price_max at Black Market at build time; check bm_buy_ts for staleness
notes.missing: items without 'q' have no reliable Black Market baseline; the app must show 'no baseline', never a guess
